semantic.role: CLI command adapter for starting the ArchSpine Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
responsibilities: Parses command-line arguments for the 'mcp' subcommand.
Instantiates and starts the ArchSpineMCPServer when the 'start' subcommand is invoked.
Provides a structured interface (ExecuteMcpCommandOptions) for MCP command execution options.
Delegates server lifecycle management to the dedicated MCP server implementation in the infrastructure layer.
outOfScope: MCP server implementation details (protocol, transport, lifecycle).
invariants: Must not absorb pipeline or persistence logic; remains a thin command adapter (as per cli-entrypoint-separation rule).
Must only import from infra/mcp/server and cli-utils; no direct dependency on core services.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintains separation of CLI command adapters from implementation logic, aligning with architectural governance.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of ArchSpine v1.0.0 release focusing on architectural governance and semantic layer.

English.role: CLI command adapter for starting the ArchSpine Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
responsibilities: Parses command-line arguments for the 'mcp' subcommand.
Instantiates and starts the ArchSpineMCPServer when the 'start' subcommand is invoked.
Provides a structured interface (ExecuteMcpCommandOptions) for MCP command execution options.
Delegates server lifecycle management to the dedicated MCP server implementation in the infrastructure layer.
outOfScope: MCP server implementation details (protocol, transport, lifecycle).

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于启动 ArchSpine 模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器的 CLI 命令适配器。
responsibilities: 解析 'mcp' 子命令的命令行参数。
当调用 'start' 子命令时，实例化并启动 ArchSpineMCPServer。
提供结构化接口（ExecuteMcpCommandOptions）用于 MCP 命令执行选项。
将服务器生命周期管理委托给基础设施层中专门的 MCP 服务器实现。
outOfScope: MCP 服务器实现细节（协议、传输、生命周期）。
持久化存储或数据库访问。
